key_risks: 🔴 Schedule Adherence: Schedule is significantly slipping. Average delay is 19.6 days with 64% of tasks running behind baseline. Maximum delay reaches 81.0 days.
🟡 Milestone Health: Some milestones need attention. 67% are on track, but 1 are at risk (Phase 1- S2C).
🟡 Task Risk Profile: Task risk profile shows moderate concern. 89% of tasks are Green, but 10% are Red and 1% are Amber.
🟡 Stakeholder Signals: Mixed stakeholder signals: 3 task(s) on hold; project flagged as High risk; 1 comment(s) flag concerns.
recommendations: Conduct an urgent schedule recovery workshop with the PM to identify acceleration opportunities.
Perform a task-level triage to re-prioritize and resolve blocked items.
Schedule a stakeholder alignment meeting to address concerns and reset expectations.
